name: IndiGo SBI Card ELITE
exclusions: transactions excluded under IndiGo SBI Card ELITE terms
milestoneBenefits: 6,000 IndiGo BluChips on annual spends of Rs 3 lakh
6,000 IndiGo BluChips on annual spends of Rs 6 lakh
6,000 IndiGo BluChips on annual spends of Rs 9 lakh
6,000 IndiGo BluChips on annual spends of Rs 12 lakh
5,000 IndiGo BluChips and 1 6E Eats voucher as renewal benefit after annual fee payment
additionalBenefits: 5,000 IndiGo BluChips and 1 6E Eats voucher as welcome benefit after annual fee payment and first transaction within 60 days
4 6E Prime passes on spending Rs 1 lakh within 90 days of account opening
7 IndiGo BluChips per Rs 100 on IndiGo app and website spends
3 IndiGo BluChips per Rs 100 on hotel, lodging and select travel MCC spends
2 IndiGo BluChips per Rs 100 on other eligible spends
IndiGo BluChips can be redeemed on IndiGo website or app against IndiGo flights and other eligible activities
8 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year, capped at 2 per quarter, subject to Rs 1 lakh spend in the previous quarter
6 complimentary international lounge visits per year, capped at 2 per quarter
4 flight cancellation covers per year, worth up to Rs 3,000 each
Lost card liability cover up to Rs 1 lakh
Check-in baggage loss cover up to Rs 72,000
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel spends from Rs 500 to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 400 per month
